designNotes: Routing tables for the romantic-fantasy-writer produced agent system. Covers 1 orchestrator, 9 coordinators, and 10 sub-coordinators. All paths are relative to the per-book output directory.

globalBounds.notes: maxAuditorRetries bounds writer→auditor loops at coordinator level. maxRevisionBetaCycles bounds the revision↔beta-reading feedback loop at orchestrator level.

routingTable.action: write own status: failed; summary: 'Concept phase blocked'
write own status: failed; summary: 'Worldbuilding phase blocked'
write own status: failed; summary: 'Character phase blocked'
write own status: failed; summary: 'Plotting phase blocked'
write own status: failed; summary: 'Style phase blocked'
write own status: failed; summary: 'Craft tracking initialization failed — craft-profile.json missing or chapter content unavailable'
write own status: failed; summary: 'Drafting phase blocked'
write own status: failed; summary: 'Continuity verification failed — chapter content unavailable or world-bible files missing'
write own status: failed; summary: 'Revision phase blocked'

check beta-synthesis verdicts: if any chapter verdict=='revision-required' AND revisionBetaCycles < maxRevisionBetaCycles → reset revision+beta status, re-dispatch revision-coordinator; else update progress.json beta-reading→complete, dispatch romantic-fantasy-writer-polish-coordinator
write own status: failed; summary: 'Beta-reading phase blocked'
write own status: delivered-with-gaps; summary: 'Polish incomplete'
write own status: delivered; summary: 'All phases complete, series KB updated'
write own status: delivered-with-gaps; summary: 'Delivered but series KB update failed'
Wait — coordinator is in its internal auditor retry loop. No action needed; coordinator will eventually resolve to 'complete' or 'blocked'. Re-read on next routing cycle.

revisionBetaLoop.description: After beta-reading completes, if any chapter has beta-synthesis verdict 'revision-required', the orchestrator re-dispatches the revision-coordinator for those chapters, then re-dispatches beta-reading. This forms a bounded loop.
revisionBetaLoop.onMaxCycles: Proceed to polish with best-effort revisions. Log outstanding beta findings in delivery-report.json.

dispatchPoints: After style-coordinator completes (initialize craft tracking artifacts)
Drafting-coordinator invokes craft-tracker updates internally via craft-enforcer
Drafting-coordinator invokes continuity updates internally via continuity-integrator
After polish-coordinator completes (promote to series KB)

resultCodeMapping.delivered: All 9 creative phases + cross-cutting agents completed successfully
resultCodeMapping.delivered-with-gaps: Core phases completed but some optional phases blocked or revision cycles exhausted
resultCodeMapping.failed: A mandatory phase (concept, worldbuilding, character, plotting, style, drafting) blocked

transientStates.revision-loop: Coordinator is in its internal auditor retry loop. The orchestrator waits and re-checks. This is never a terminal state — it always resolves to 'complete' or 'blocked'.

routingTable.action: delete agents/concept-developer/status.json, agents/craft-profile-selector/status.json, agents/concept-auditor/status.json; increment retries; re-dispatch romantic-fantasy-writer-concept-developer
write own status: blocked; summary: 'Concept failed auditor gate after max retries'

resultCodeMapping.complete: Concept and craft profile passed auditor gate
resultCodeMapping.revision-loop: Currently in auditor retry loop (transient state)

routingTable.action: read audit-reports/worldbuilding/gate.json to identify failing area; delete sub-coordinator + auditor statuses; increment retries; re-dispatch romantic-fantasy-writer-physical-world-coordinator
write own status: blocked; summary: 'Worldbuilding failed auditor gate after max retries'

resultCodeMapping.complete: All world-bible subcategories built and passed auditor gate
resultCodeMapping.revision-loop: Currently in auditor retry loop (transient state)

routingTable.action: read audit-reports/character/gate.json; delete sub-coordinator + specialist + auditor statuses; increment retries; re-dispatch romantic-fantasy-writer-core-characters-coordinator
write own status: blocked; summary: 'Characters failed auditor gate after max retries'

resultCodeMapping.complete: All characters profiled, romance arc designed, voices calibrated, passed auditor gate
resultCodeMapping.revision-loop: Currently in auditor retry loop (transient state)

routingTable.action: read audit-reports/plotting/gate.json; delete sub-coordinator + specialist + auditor statuses; increment retries; re-dispatch romantic-fantasy-writer-structural-design-coordinator
write own status: blocked; summary: 'Plotting failed auditor gate after max retries'

resultCodeMapping.complete: Plot structure, dual-arc timeline, tension map, chapter outlines, and scene beats all passed auditor gate
resultCodeMapping.revision-loop: Currently in auditor retry loop (transient state)

routingTable.action: delete agents/style-analyzer/status.json, agents/style-guide-writer/status.json, agents/style-auditor/status.json; increment retries; re-dispatch romantic-fantasy-writer-style-analyzer
write own status: blocked; summary: 'Style failed auditor gate after max retries'

resultCodeMapping.complete: Style guide written and passed auditor gate
resultCodeMapping.revision-loop: Currently in auditor retry loop (transient state)

perChapterLoop.description: Chapters are drafted sequentially (INV-012). For each chapter N from 1 to estimatedChapterCount: dispatch creative-writing → quality-integration → drafting-auditor. Auditor loop applies per-chapter.
perChapterLoop.sequentialEnforcement: Chapter N+1 cannot begin until chapter N passes the drafting auditor gate (INV-012)

routingTable.action: write own status: blocked; summary: 'Creative writing blocked at chapter N'
write own status: blocked; summary: 'Quality integration blocked at chapter N'
update progress.json chapterProgress[N].drafted=true; increment currentChapter; delete per-chapter sub-statuses; dispatch romantic-fantasy-writer-creative-writing-coordinator for next chapter
update progress.json chapterProgress[N].drafted=true; write own status: complete; summary: 'All chapters drafted and passed auditor gates'
read audit-reports/drafting/gate.json; delete per-chapter sub-statuses; increment chapterRetries; re-dispatch romantic-fantasy-writer-creative-writing-coordinator for same chapter
write own status: blocked; summary: 'Chapter N failed drafting auditor after max retries'

loopConfig.notes: Retries counter resets per chapter. Each chapter gets up to maxRetries attempts independently.

convergenceBounds.notes: Per-chapter retry count. Total dispatches = chapters × (1 + retries). For a 20-chapter book with no retries, ~60 specialist dispatches.

resultCodeMapping.complete: All chapters drafted, quality-integrated, and passed auditor gates
resultCodeMapping.blocked: A chapter failed drafting or audit
resultCodeMapping.revision-loop: Currently in per-chapter auditor retry loop (transient state)

perChapterLoop.description: For each chapter N: three editing passes (developmental → line → copy) run sequentially, then chapter-reviser applies all fixes, then revision-auditor gates quality. Chapters can be processed in any order since editing is independent.
perChapterLoop.sequentialEnforcement: The three editing passes within a chapter are sequential (each builds on the prior). Chapters themselves could be parallel but are routed sequentially for simplicity.

routingTable.action: update progress.json chapterProgress[N].revised=true; advance to next chapter; delete per-chapter sub-statuses; dispatch developmental-editor for next chapter
update progress.json chapterProgress[N].revised=true; write own status: complete

read audit-reports/revision/gate.json; delete agents/chapter-reviser/status.json, agents/revision-auditor/status.json; increment chapterRetries; re-dispatch romantic-fantasy-writer-chapter-reviser for same chapter
write own status: blocked; summary: 'Chapter N failed revision auditor after max retries'

loopConfig.notes: On retry, only the reviser re-runs (edit reports from dev/line/copy editors are preserved as they represent independent assessments).

resultCodeMapping.complete: All chapters revised through 3 edit passes and passed auditor gate
resultCodeMapping.blocked: A chapter failed revision or audit
resultCodeMapping.revision-loop: Currently in per-chapter auditor retry loop (transient state)

parallelGroups.notes: Genre and craft lens coordinators can run in parallel — they read the same revised chapter independently

perChapterLoop.description: For each chapter N: fan out to genre-lens-coordinator and craft-lens-coordinator in parallel, then synthesize, then audit. Chapters processed sequentially.
perChapterLoop.sequentialEnforcement: Chapters are sequential; within each chapter, the two lens coordinators are parallel.

routingTable.action: update progress.json chapterProgress[N].betaRead=true; advance to next chapter; delete per-chapter sub-statuses; dispatch lens coordinators for next chapter
update progress.json chapterProgress[N].betaRead=true; write own status: complete
read audit-reports/beta-reading/gate.json; delete lens + synthesizer + auditor statuses; increment chapterRetries; re-dispatch lens coordinators for same chapter
write own status: blocked; summary: 'Chapter N failed beta-reading auditor after max retries'

resultCodeMapping.complete: All chapters beta-read across 5 lenses, synthesized, and passed auditor gate
resultCodeMapping.blocked: A chapter failed beta-reading or audit
resultCodeMapping.revision-loop: Currently in per-chapter auditor retry loop (transient state)

perChapterLoop.description: For each chapter N: polisher finalizes prose → summary-generator creates chapter summary. After all chapters: delivery-assembler produces the final report.
perChapterLoop.sequentialEnforcement: Chapters can be polished in any order. Delivery assembler runs only after all chapters are polished.

routingTable.action: update progress.json chapterProgress[N].polished=true; advance to next chapter; delete per-chapter sub-statuses; dispatch polisher for next chapter

convergenceBounds.notes: No auditor loop. Polish is the terminal creative phase. If polishing fails, the coordinator reports blocked.

resultCodeMapping.complete: All chapters polished, summaries generated, delivery report assembled

romantic-fantasy-writer-physical-world-c.sequenceRationale: Geography must exist before culture (INV-074: geography constrains cultural norms). Culture must exist before history (history explains both). Sequential dependency chain.

resultCodeMapping.complete: Geography, culture, and history world-bible subcategories built

romantic-fantasy-writer-systems-world-co.sequenceRationale: Magic system must be defined before political structures (magic affects who holds power and how governance works).

resultCodeMapping.complete: Magic system and political structures designed

romantic-fantasy-writer-core-characters-.sequenceRationale: Protagonist profiles (wounds, desires, psychology) must exist before romance arc can be designed between the leads.

resultCodeMapping.complete: Protagonists profiled and romance arc designed

romantic-fantasy-writer-ensemble-coordin.sequenceRationale: Supporting cast must be defined (roles, relationships) before voice fingerprints can be designed for all characters including supporting.

resultCodeMapping.complete: Supporting cast developed and all character voices designed

romantic-fantasy-writer-structural-desig.sequenceRationale: Framework selection → dual-arc timeline (needs framework) → tension mapping (needs both arcs laid out). Strict data dependency chain.

resultCodeMapping.complete: Plot structure selected, dual arcs built, tension mapped

romantic-fantasy-writer-chapter-design-c.sequenceRationale: Chapter outlines (POV, goals, conflicts per chapter) must exist before scene beats (Five Commandments, emotional beats) can be designed within them.

resultCodeMapping.complete: All chapter outlines written and scene beats designed

romantic-fantasy-writer-creative-writing.sequenceRationale: Chapter draft must be written before POV voice can be verified and adjusted within it.

resultCodeMapping.complete: Chapter drafted and POV voice verified
resultCodeMapping.blocked: Creative writing failed for this chapter

romantic-fantasy-writer-quality-integrat.sequenceRationale: Continuity check runs first (fixes factual/timeline errors) before craft enforcement (checks structural/technique quality). Both modify the draft but continuity errors are more fundamental.

resultCodeMapping.complete: Chapter passed continuity and craft enforcement checks
resultCodeMapping.blocked: Quality integration failed for this chapter

parallelGroups.notes: Both genre lens readers run in parallel — they read the same revised chapter independently and produce independent feedback

routingTable.condition: either result == 'blocked' (wait for other to finish first)

resultCodeMapping.complete: Both genre lens readers provided feedback

parallelGroups.notes: All three craft lens readers run in parallel — independent assessments of the same revised chapter

routingTable.action: dispatch all three craft lens readers in parallel

routingTable.condition: any result == 'blocked' (wait for others to finish first)

resultCodeMapping.complete: All three craft lens readers provided feedback
